changes: Added a page 2 search for single-product tasks to double the candidate pool from 10 to up to 20 results, giving the relevance scoring more high-quality options to select the best product match from.
Added a third search using the first 3 keywords of the extracted query (retaining price/service filters) to diversify the product candidate pool — shorter Lucene queries surface different products t

Used LLM-extracted keywords instead of the full noisy query for product relevance scoring in `_handle_single_product`, so the title-overlap scoring focuses on actual product terms rather than filler p

Added LLM-extracted keyword scoring as a 0.5-weight bonus on top of full-query scoring in `_select_best_product`, so single-product candidates matching both the full query AND the focused LLM keywords
Added a supplementary search without the service API filter (when a service requirement exists) that post-filters results by the required service tags — this diversifies the candidate pool by surfac

Added LLM-based reranking of top-3 keyword-scored candidates in `_handle_single_product`, so the final product selection uses semantic understanding (rather than pure keyword overlap) to pick the best

Expanded `_collect_broad_shop_results` to fetch page 2 alongside page 1 for each spec, doubling the candidate shop pool (20 products per spec instead of 10) without consuming dialogue steps — this s
